lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Erm.. Da's very kindly of you creature!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey you creature! Make me some stabbers! I wanna hunt da chompy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stabbers?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: For da stabbie chucker, I's wanna hunt da chompy! Da chompy is der bestest yummies for Rantz, Fycie and Bugs! Creature knows what Rantz wants... flyin' to stabbie da chompy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I understand. You want me to make some arrows for you?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Yeah, is what Rantz sayed, make da stabbers for da stabby chucker!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, I'll make you some 'stabbers'.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Good you creature, you need sticksies from achey tree and stabbies from dog bones.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, make you're own 'stabbers'!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: When I make 'stabbers', I pretend you chompy and practice on you!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey deyr, t'anks for da chompy, it was scrumbly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I hear you're giving away free hats!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Huh, dat's a true thing but you's godda be da good shooter wiv da stabbie chucker and stick lotsa chompies for da hatsie.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the hats like?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Huh der is this many colours... ~ Rantz holds up six fingers.~ And der is dis many different hatsies... ~ Rantz holds up three fingers.~

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Ok you's creature, here's da hatsies! ~ Rantz shows you the hats. ~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the hats like?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Huh der is this many colours: ~ Rantz holds up six fingers. ~ And der is dis many different hatsies: ~ Rantz holds up three fingers. ~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get a hat?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: If you creature shows me da bow wiv da notches on it, I'll give ya a flapper hat... is dat simple enough for you's creature?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many Chompies do I have to stick?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: We'll dat's da fing wiv da hatsies, dey's many hatsies for da many chompies dat you stick. But you's godda get at least this many for a hat. ~ Rantz flashes fingers at you, you think he means 30. ~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a hat please?

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's creature show me da bow den!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry Rantz, I don't have the bow.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Dat's da shame thing dat is! No flapper hat for you den!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Sorry, but der's no new hats for you this time! Go shoot some more chompies.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey, yous creature needs to hunt da chompie if you's wants der's flappy hat!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey, yous creature needs to hunt more chompies if you's wants der's flappy hat!

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hey, you did good wiv da stabbie chucker, der's a flappy hat for ya.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's person has too much junk for da flappy hat... Rantz keeps it insteads! ~ Rantz chuckles to himself. ~

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: Claiming arrows after completing any tier of Western Provinces Diary
If the player has no inventory space

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: No space 'uman. Make some for da stabbies.

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: Hav' da stabbies. More toe'morrow if you come see Rantz.

sections.title: Trying to claim arrows after having claimed them

lines.speaker: Rantz
lines.text: You's already claimed da stabbies today 'uman. Come toe'morrow for mor'
